100% client-side · No signup

Turn any PDF into a quiz. Free.

Drop a PDF, pick a difficulty, and get 50+ multiple-choice questions in seconds. Download as PDF. No upload, no account, no tracking.

Start for free See how it works

No file leaves your browser. We mean it.

Features

Everything you need to study smarter.

A focused tool that does one thing well — turning study material into questions you can actually practice with.

50+ questions, every time

Key-term extraction and cloze deletion run on your PDF locally to produce at least 50 unique multiple-choice questions.

100% private, by design

Your PDF is parsed and processed entirely in your browser. It is never uploaded to a server. Close the tab and it is gone.

Three difficulty levels

Easy masks the most obvious terms, Medium uses balanced cloze rules, Hard targets rare acronyms and multi-word phrases.

How it works

Three steps. About ten seconds.

  1. STEP_01

    Drop a PDF

    Drag the file onto the page or click to pick one. We use .PDF to extract the text entirely in your browser.

  2. STEP_02

    Pick a difficulty

    Choose Easy, Medium, or Hard. Set how many questions you want — anywhere from 5 to 100.

  3. STEP_03

    Download your quiz

    Export as PDF for easy printing, sharing, and studying offline.

Why this, not that

Free. Forever.

Other quiz tools charge per document or gate features behind a subscription. We do not.

Feature Free PDF to Quiz Paid tools
Unlimited PDFs + Yes Tiered, often capped
No account needed + Yes Required
File never leaves your device + Yes Uploaded to a server
Difficulty levels + Easy / Medium / Hard Sometimes
PDF export + Yes Often paywalled
Price + Free $5 – $30 / month

FAQ

Common questions.

Is it really free? What's the catch? +

No catch. The whole tool runs in your browser, so we have no server costs to pass on. No account, no email, no credit card, no "free trial."

Does my PDF get uploaded somewhere? +

No. .PDF parses the file in your browser tab. We never see it, store it, or transmit it. Close the tab and the file is gone.

How does it generate questions without an AI? +

We use a rules-based pipeline: extract text → score key terms with TF-IDF → mask the highest-value term in each sentence (cloze deletion) → build three plausible distractors from the same document. The first question is not always perfect, but Easy/Medium/Hard lets you tune the difficulty.

What about scanned PDFs or image-only documents? +

v1 does not include OCR. If we can't extract any text from your PDF, we will tell you immediately and suggest you run it through a free OCR tool first.

What file types are supported? +

PDFs with selectable text. We will add DOCX and Markdown input in a future version.

Can I edit the questions after they're generated? +

Not in v1 — but the source sentence is shown next to every question, so you can find and edit it in the exported file. An in-app editor is on the roadmap.

Make a quiz in the next ten seconds.

Pick a PDF, click start. That is the whole flow.

Start for free
